call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Good, thanks. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm thinking about consolidating some debt. Agent: Excellent! That's a very common use for our loans.  We can definitely help with that. What kind of debt are we looking at? Customer: Credit card debt, mostly. About 8 grand. Agent: Okay, so a $10,000 Personal Loan at 8.99% would cover that and give you a little extra for, you know, emergencies. The monthly payments would be around $198.  Does that sound manageable? Customer: Hmm, that's… actually pretty good. What are the terms? Agent: It's a 60-month term.  No prepayment penalties.  We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. Customer: Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a pre-approved offer. We are offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%. Customer: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? I have excellent credit! Agent: Well, sir, the rate is based on several factors… Customer: Look, I'm not interested. Take my number off your list.  I'm hanging up now. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to me by GreenTech Financial.  How are you today? Customer: Hi David, yeah, they said you guys might be able to help me with a home renovation loan. Agent: Absolutely! We specialize in those. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What kind of renovations are you planning? Customer: Kitchen remodel, mostly. New cabinets, countertops, appliances. Agent: Sounds fantastic!  With a $15,000 loan at 7.49%, your monthly payments would be around $283.  We have several term options, from 36 to 72 months. Customer: 72 months sounds good.  What's the APR? Agent: The APR is 8.12%, including fees.  We have a small origination fee of $150. Customer: Okay, that's reasonable.  Can we move forward with the application? Agent: Absolutely! Let's get some details from you...

Agent: Hi Michael, this is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you applied for our Signature Credit Card online.  How are you doing? Customer: Doing alright. Just looking for a card with a decent rewards program. Agent: Great! We are offering a $5000 Signature Credit Card at 14.99% with 2% cashback on all purchases.  It also comes with travel insurance and purchase protection. Customer: 14.99% is a little high, but the cashback sounds good. What's the credit limit? Agent: The initial credit limit is $5000, but it can be increased based on your creditworthiness.  We can review that after six months of responsible use. Customer: Okay.  I'm still comparing options, but I'll definitely consider it.  Can you send me some more information via email? Agent: Absolutely! I'll send you a detailed brochure and a link to the online application.  Thanks for your time, Michael.

Agent: Hello Mrs. Davis? This is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering… Customer: (Interrupting) Oh, not again! You guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested!  I don't need a loan! Agent: Ma'am, we are offering a $3000 Personal Loan at 22.99%… Customer: 22.99?! That's outrageous!  I want my number removed from your list!  I'm reporting you to the Do Not Call Registry! *click*

Agent: Hi David, this is Mark from Finance Solutions. I see you applied for our Signature Credit Card online.  How are you doing today? Customer: Good, thanks. I'm looking for a card with a low interest rate and good rewards. Agent: Excellent! We are pre-approving you for a $7500 Signature Credit Card at 11.99% with 3% cashback on dining and travel. Customer: That sounds pretty good. What are the fees? Agent: There's an annual fee of $99, but it's waived for the first year. There's also a late payment fee of $35.  We also have a foreign transaction fee of 1%. Customer: Okay, the annual fee is a bit much, but the cashback is attractive. What's the APR? Agent: The APR is 12.65%, including fees.  We also offer balance transfers with a 0% introductory rate for 12 months. Customer: Balance transfers? That's interesting. I have some high-interest debt on another card. Agent: Perfect! You can transfer that balance to our card and save a significant amount of money on interest.  We can get the application finalized right now.  Do you have your social security number handy? Customer: Yeah, let's do it. I'm ready to apply.

Agent: Hi Linda, this is David from Finance Solutions. I see you're an existing customer. We're offering a special rate on Personal Loans. Customer: Oh, hi. I'm not really looking for a loan right now. Agent: We are offering an $8000 Personal Loan at 16.99%.  Perhaps you could use it for home improvements or debt consolidation? Customer: I appreciate the offer, but I'm pretty comfortable with my finances. I'm just not interested. Agent: Okay, I understand.  Would you like me to send you some information about our other products, like our credit cards? Customer: No, thank you. I'm all set.

Agent: Hello Mr. Lee? This is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering… Customer: (Interrupting) Where did you even get my number? I never authorized this call. Agent: Sir, we are offering a $6000 Signature Credit Card at 13.99%… Customer: Look, I'm a busy professional. I don't have time for this. *click*

Agent: Hi Maria, this is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a personal loan on our website. How can I help you today? Customer: Hi Lisa, yes, I'm looking to consolidate some student loan debt. Agent: Excellent! We are pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 6.99%. That's a fantastic rate, especially with your excellent credit score. Customer: That sounds good. What are the terms and conditions? Agent: We offer terms from 36 to 84 months. The APR is 7.25%, including a small origination fee of $200. There are no prepayment penalties. Customer: No prepayment penalties? That's great. What would my monthly payments be for a 60-month term? Agent: Your monthly payments would be approximately $386.  We also offer a rate discount if you enroll in automatic payments. Customer: Oh, really? How much of a discount? Agent: 0.25%. So your rate would drop to 6.74%. Customer: That's a good incentive. I think I'm ready to move forward. Agent: Wonderful! Let's get started with the application. I'll need some personal information from you...

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson? This is David from Finance Solutions. We're offering… Customer: (Yelling) Are you kidding me?! You people have called me three times this week! I told you I'm unemployed and can't afford anything! I'm filing a complaint with the Better Business Bureau! *click*
